decision.reason: The evidence threshold was not met. A baseline synthetic extension hostcall workload completed cleanly, but the AMAC-enabled candidate with identical arguments did not emit a report after more than 30 seconds for a 4 second workload. Provider streaming, local tool contention, cancellation latency, and final transcript equivalence were not established, so there is no claim-gated basis for implementing cooperative priority lanes now.

blocking_reasons: Only the extension-hostcall baseline produced usable metrics.
The AMAC-enabled candidate timed out and emitted no report.
Provider streaming and local tool contention evidence was not collected.
Final transcript equivalence was not established.

workloads.notes: The successful baseline exercises real extension hostcall dispatch through the ext_stress reactor path. The candidate used the same workload shape with PI_HOSTCALL_AMAC=1 and did not complete in the bounded probe window.
No provider stream contention run was collected for this evaluation.
Existing effect-compatible scheduler tests cover transcript semantics, but this bead did not collect local tool priority-lane latency data.

comparison.reason: The candidate emitted no report, so no latency delta can be computed or claimed.

candidate.notes: The candidate was terminated after the bounded probe window because it did not finish a 4 second workload and did not emit report or event files. This is filed separately as bd-2zcs5.31.

rch_path_caveat.notes: An rch cargo run attempt using /data/tmp CLI output paths failed before workload execution because arbitrary CLI output paths are not rewritten onto remote workers. Reproduction commands should use worker-local /tmp paths or run the warmed binary directly on the host that owns the output paths.

commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/sunnybeacon/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/sunnybeacon/tmp PI_HOSTCALL_AMAC=0 cargo run --example ext_stress -- --synthetic-hostcall-extensions 4 --synthetic-hostcall-root /tmp/pi-agent-rust-sunnybeacon-bd29-baseline2-synthetic --event agent_start --reactor-enabled=true --reactor-shards 4 --reactor-lane-capacity 128 --reactor-drain-budget 128 --duration-secs 4 --warmup-secs 0 --rss-interval-secs 1 --events-per-sec 2 --dispatch-timeout-ms 2000 --require-reactor-activity=true --report-path /tmp/pi-agent-rust-sunnybeacon-bd29-baseline2.json --events-path /tmp/pi-agent-rust-sunnybeacon-bd29-baseline2-events.jsonl --run-id bd-2zcs5-29-baseline2 --correlation-id bd-2zcs5-29-priority-lane
path_caveats: For rch worker execution, keep CLI output paths under /tmp or another path that exists on the worker.
The direct binary commands assume the ext_stress example binary already exists at /data/tmp/cargo-target/debug/examples/ext_stress.

recommendations: Do not implement cooperative priority lanes yet.
Investigate bd-2zcs5.31 before treating AMAC interleaving as a viable priority-lane candidate.
A future implementation bead must include provider streaming, local tool, extension hostcall, cancellation latency, fairness/starvation, and final transcript equivalence evidence before promotion.
